text:
Created attachment 208195
patch to 1.3.1

Changelog:

1.3.1:
PR #321 - fix metric collection for Google Cloud Memorystore, for real this time

1.3.0:
PR #318 - fix metric collection for Google Cloud Memorystore

1.2.2:
PR #317 - trigger release build to publish new alpine tagged docker image (thx @mdawar )

1.2.1:
PR #312 - publish docker builds for arm and arm64
update Golang images to 1.13

1.2.0:
PR #313 fix latency spike duration metric (thx @kevinfulkerson )
Breaking change: latency_spike_timestamp_seconds was renamed to latency_spike_duration_seconds

1.1.1:
PR #311 fix handling of IP addresses when using the /scrape endpoint
PR #311 set client name to redis_exporter when connecting to redis
